nasb.text: Therefore the Lord raises against them adversaries from Rezin And spurs their enemies on,

esv.text: But the Lord raises the adversaries of Rezin against him, and stirs up his enemies.

cnv.text: 因此，耶和華必興起利汛的敵人來攻擊以色列， 並且要激動以色列的仇敵。

ccb.text: 因此耶和华必驱使敌人来攻击他们。

csbs.text: 因此，耶和华必兴起利汛的敌人来攻击以色列， 并且要激起以色列的仇敌，
